description: After v0.3.10 shipped, CHANGELOG has release-plz's auto-generated bullet list under [0.3.10] plus a leftover hand-written ### Changes block (the curated bl-2148 / bl-2bf7 / bl-2572 entries that had been queued in [Unreleased]). Result is two ### Changes headings under one version with overlapping content. Why: release-plz writes its own section from commit subjects, but the repo has been hand-curating [Unreleased] in parallel. Fix is to fold the curated bullets into the single [0.3.10] block, replacing the matching auto-bullets, and drop the duplicate heading. No version bump; commit subject is prefixed `balls:` so release-plz's changelog parser skips it.
title: CHANGELOG: collapse the 0.3.10 duplicate `### Changes` blocks
